extortion.description: hafa.fr zoominfo.com/c/hafa/458792496 Lubricants designed by experts to always go further. This is the HAFA Pioneering Spirit. Since 1953, HAFA has demonstrated its ability to renew itself and accompany you towards ever-greater performance. A single partner with a range of lubricants that meets all my needs. For me, it's HAFA. Hafa offers product ranges that cover all professional uses and simplifies the management of your lubricant needs.
